recommendations.title: Teen Wolf
recommendations.overview: When a shy teenager's new-found powers help him score at basketball - and with the popular girls - he has some pretty hairy decisions to make.

recommendations.title: K-9
recommendations.overview: The extravagant cop Michael Dooley needs some help to fight a drug dealer who has tried to kill him. A "friend" gives him a dog named Jerry Lee (Officer Lewis), who has been trained to smell drugs. With his help, Dooley sets out to put his enemy behi

recommendations.title: Keith

recommendations.title: Muppets Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: Gonzo is challenged to spend one night in The Haunted Mansion on Halloween night.

recommendations.title: The Good Witch
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes in to town and inhabits the local haunted mansion, making everyone wonder if she's a witch or "The Grey Lady".

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: In My Dreams
recommendations.overview: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.
